- What changed and why?

- [ ] Frontend

- Skill(s) selected:

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet restore` (if backend touched)
- [ ] `dotnet build` (if backend touched)
- [ ] `dotnet test` (if backend touched)
- [ ] `npm run lint` (if frontend touched)
- [ ] `npm run build` (if frontend touched)

## Session Continuity Update (Required)

- [ ] Updated `./.ai-context/SESSION_HANDOFF.md` (or `./backend/.ai-context/SESSION_HANDOFF.md` when backend-only)

Handoff notes added:

- Files changed:
- Decisions/assumptions:
- Validation results:
- Next suggested action:

## Risks / Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes included (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] No accidental build artifacts committed (`bin`, `obj`, `.next`)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior/config changed
- [ ] Changes are scoped and reviewable
